steps.title: Apply the temporary-label idea
steps.content: The researchers say native and invasive labels depend on current circumstances because climate change can shift where species live. The completion must apply that time-based logic to Maryland's flathead catfish.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice A invents an exception for this catfish; Choice B looks backward to a past Maryland population; Choice D removes the climate-change mechanism. Choice C keeps the current label possible while allowing future conditions to change it. The answer is C.
